Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Abusing Customizable Selects 95 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 65 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster 57 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain 86 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. A 6502 disassembler with a TUI: A modern take on Regenerator 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Autoresearch on an old research idea 345 upvotes, 72 comments
  7. Log File Viewer for the Terminal 60 upvotes, 8 comments
  8. Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom to work with Apple Home 90 upvotes, 16 comments
  9. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 146 upvotes, 33 comments
  10. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 198 upvotes, 49 comments
  11. Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive 236 upvotes, 64 comments
  13. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp 84 upvotes, 19 comments
  14. Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks 33 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 340 upvotes, 104 comments
  16. BIO – The Bao I/O Co-Processor 28 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 150 upvotes, 46 comments
  18. Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun' 64 upvotes, 16 comments
  19. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 195 upvotes, 69 comments
  20. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 128 upvotes, 43 comments
  21. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 586 upvotes, 267 comments
  22. An incoherent Rust 176 upvotes, 81 comments
  23. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 188 upvotes, 108 comments
  24. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 187 upvotes, 109 comments
  25. Microsoft blocks trick to unlock native NVMe driver, but workarounds still exist 36 upvotes, 15 comments
  26. FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers 298 upvotes, 201 comments
  27. Microservices and the First Law of Distributed Objects (2014) 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem 294 upvotes, 269 comments
  29. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 263 upvotes, 278 comments
  30. The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M 85 upvotes, 107 comments

Last generated 4:00pm, 24 March 2026. Source here.
